name: huawei-jiaxian
description: Huawei's 稼先社区 (jx.huawei.com) — the internal expert/engineer knowledge community. `search` returns the top N most relevant documents (title, type, author, date, views, replies, rich summary, url); `read` fetches one post's full body by postId. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search Huawei's 稼先社区 (jx.huawei.com). Given an arbitrary question, returns the top N most relevant posts (title, author, type, date, views, replies, rich summary, url). Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.

args.name: query
args.help: Your question or search term (e.g. "大模型推理优化", "5G架构演进")

args.name: limit
args.help: Max number of documents to return (N)

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read the full content of a single 稼先社区 post by its postId (bare 32-char hex id, or the full detail URL). Returns the complete article body plus title, author, date, views, likes, replies. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.

args.name: post_id
args.help: The post id — either a bare 32-char hex postId (e.g. da25639435334344912733f65c592a1b) or a full detail URL from jx.huawei.com

args.name: type
args.help: Resource type: free_post | technical_report | industry_report (only free_post is supported)
